name: Hunyuan (1st-gen)
note: Tencent's first in-house foundation model (100B+ params, 2T+ pretraining tokens), launched for enterprises via Tencent Cloud API and wired into 50+ Tencent products.
verificationNotes:
Confirmed existence and release (Sept 7, 2023, Global Digital Ecosystem Summit) plus '100B+ params, 2T+ tokens' claim via Tencent's own announcement article and corroborating press (Yahoo Finance/SCMP/Pandaily). FLAGGED, NOT CORRECTED: ctxK=4 (4K context) could not be independently confirmed — the cited source article does not mention context length at all, and no other primary source could be found tying a specific context-window figure to this original Sept-2023 release (later 2024-era Hunyuan API tiers like hunyuan-lite show 3K-28K depending on interface, unrelated to this model). Schema requires a numeric ctxK so the original value was kept, but treat it as low-confidence/unverified rather than confirmed. paramsB kept null since only '100B+' was ever disclosed, no exact figure found. No results/benchmark rows were present to verify. ROUND-7 EXHAUSTIVE-SEARCH RECORD (2026-07-15, methodology-diversified per native-language/regional-leaderboard instructions): No qualifying benchmark result found for Hunyuan (1st-gen, Sept 2023, Tencent) after a widened, Chinese-language-first search. Checked: Tencent's own Chinese press coverage (news.qq.com, 36Kr, QbitAI/量子位, Leiphone/雷峰网, Zhihu, Baidu Baike [blocked]), the official Tencent Cloud product-brief PDF (main.qcloudimg.com/raw/document/product/pdf/1729_97729_cn.pdf — fully read, no historical benchmark table, describes only the current 2025/2026 product line), C-Eval's official leaderboard (Hunyuan/Tencent absent entirely — confirmed via llm-stats.com mirror since cevalbenchmark.com has an expired TLS cert), SuperCLUE/cluebenchmarks.com (no 2023-era Hunyuan entry; Hunyuan scores only start appearing from Aug 2024 onward and are attributed to later model variants like Hunyuan-Turbo-Preview, not this 1st-gen model), OpenCompass/司南, Artificial Analysis (tracks only Hunyuan Video and 2026-era Hy3/Hy3-preview, never the 2023 closed-API 1st-gen model), and OpenRouter (only lists Hunyuan-A13B and Hy3, both post-2024 open-weight releases; the 1st-gen closed China-only API was never distributed there). Wayback Machine (web.archive.org) could not be fetched in this environment. Every source repeats the same non-numeric marketing claim from Tencent's own Sept 2023 launch article ("excellent performance on MMLU/C-Eval/AGI-eval") with zero actual scores ever published, and the model does not appear on any scored public leaderboard from that period. This looks like a genuine case where the vendor never released a citable numeric benchmark result for this specific model — recommend concluding no public data exists rather than continuing to search. ROUND-13 STRUCTURED-SOURCE CHECK (2026-07-15, Epoch AI raw benchmark feed + Vals.ai leaderboards, checked directly): No new benchmark results found for Hunyuan (1st-gen) (Tencent, Sept 2023) after checking the two specified structured sources plus two backups. Result: zero citable numeric scores exist anywhere checked.

1. Epoch AI raw data feed — fetched both https://epoch.ai/data/benchmarks.json (179KB, benchmark-definitions/metadata only, 20 benchmark keys) and https://epoch.ai/data/benchmarks.csv (2.29MB, the actual model x benchmark results table, header row confirms columns like model, Best score, Organization, Hugging Face developer id, etc.). Case-insensitive grep for "hunyuan" across benchmarks.json found exactly one hit, and it was unrelated to model results: a description of the CL-bench benchmark noting it was "created by the Tencent Hunyuan team" (i.e. Hunyuan researchers built a benchmark, not a Hunyuan model being scored on one).
